vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete absence of living plant specimens across all registered pots. The initial images show bare soil and a white rabbit figurine, with no signs of the expected String of Nickels, Mexican Mint, or Pothos. The presence of eggshells indicates a past, undocumented soil amendment. The sequence concludes with a total failure of visual input, rendering the current state of the biome unobservable.
